concepts.name: AwarenessState
concepts.what: Presence state for a single agent.

concepts.name: AwarenessEventType
concepts.what: Events emitted when awareness state changes.

concepts.name: LRUCacheOptions
concepts.what: Configuration options for constructing an `LRUCache` instance.

properties.name: maxSize
properties.description: Maximum number of entries before the least-recently-used entry is evicted (default: 1000).

properties.name: ttl
properties.description: Default time-to-live in milliseconds for new entries (default: 24 hours).

concepts.name: ClassificationResult
concepts.what: Result of `classifyContent`.  Mirrors `ClassificationResult` from `crates/llmtxt-core/src/classify/types.rs`.

properties.name: mimeType
properties.description: IANA MIME type, e.g. `"application/pdf"`, `"text/markdown"`, `"image/png"`.

properties.name: category
properties.description: Coarse content category.

properties.name: format
properties.description: Specific content format.  Binary: `'pdf'` | `'png'` | `'jpeg'` | `'gif'` | `'webp'` | `'avif'` | `'svg'` |         `'mp4'` | `'webm'` | `'mp3'` | `'wav'` | `'ogg'` | `'zip'`  Text:   `'markdown'` | `'json'` | `'javascript'` | `'typescript'` | `'python'` |         `'rust'` | `'go'` | `'plainText'`  Fallback: `'unknown'`

properties.name: confidence
properties.description: Classification confidence in `[0.0, 1.0]`. See Rust spec for semantics.

properties.name: isExtractable
properties.description: Whether useful text content can be extracted from this format. `true` for text formats and PDF; `false` for images, audio, video, zip.

concepts.name: SearchResult
concepts.what: A single match returned by `searchContent`.

properties.name: line
properties.description: 1-based line number of the matching line.

properties.name: content
properties.description: The full text of the matching line.

properties.name: contextBefore
properties.description: Lines immediately preceding the match (up to `contextLines`).

properties.name: contextAfter
properties.description: Lines immediately following the match (up to `contextLines`).

concepts.name: LineRangeResult
concepts.what: Result of extracting a line range from a document via `getLineRange`.

properties.name: startLine
properties.description: 1-based line number where the extracted range begins.

properties.name: endLine
properties.description: 1-based line number where the extracted range ends (inclusive).

properties.name: content
properties.description: The extracted text content for the requested line range.

properties.name: tokenCount
properties.description: Estimated token count for the extracted content.

properties.name: totalLines
properties.description: Total number of lines in the full document.

properties.name: totalTokens
properties.description: Estimated total token count for the full document.

properties.name: tokensSaved
properties.description: Number of tokens saved by extracting only this range.

concepts.name: StructuredDiffResult
concepts.what: Full structured diff result with interleaved lines and summary counts.

concepts.name: MultiDiffResult
concepts.what: Full result of a multi-way diff.

concepts.name: CherryPickResult
concepts.what: Return value of a cherry-pick merge operation.

concepts.name: ThreeWayMergeResult
concepts.what: Full result of a 3-way merge operation.

properties.name: merged
properties.description: The merged document content, with conflict markers where applicable.

properties.name: hasConflicts
properties.description: `true` when at least one conflict could not be auto-merged.

properties.name: conflicts
properties.description: Details of each conflict region.

properties.name: stats
properties.description: Summary statistics for the merge.

concepts.name: SemanticDiffResult
concepts.what: Full result of a semantic diff between two document versions.

concepts.name: SemanticConsensusResult
concepts.what: Result of semantic consensus evaluation across a set of reviews.

concepts.name: SimilarityRankResult
concepts.what: Result entry from rankBySimilarity.

concepts.name: AttachmentOptions
concepts.what: Options for creating an attachment via the bridge.

concepts.name: AttachmentReshareOptions
concepts.what: Options for re-sharing an existing attachment.

concepts.name: AttachmentVersionOptions
concepts.what: Options for appending a version to an existing attachment slug.

concepts.name: DocumentEventType
concepts.what: Discriminant for document lifecycle events emitted by the event bus.  Consumers should use this type when subscribing to the bus or when filtering events in webhook handlers.

concepts.name: DocumentEvent
concepts.what: Payload for a document lifecycle event.  Emitted by the in-process event bus after a successful database write. Consumers include WebSocket/SSE streams and webhook delivery workers.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Discriminant — consumers can switch on this.

properties.name: slug
properties.description: Short URL slug of the affected document.

properties.name: documentId
properties.description: Opaque document primary key.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

properties.name: actor
properties.description: userId or agentId that triggered the event. 'system' for auto-actions.

properties.name: data
properties.description: Event-specific supplemental data.

concepts.name: ResignResult
concepts.what: Backward-compatible alias. Prefer `ReshareResult`.

concepts.name: SubscribeSectionOptions
concepts.what: Options for `subscribeSection`.

properties.name: baseUrl
properties.description: Base URL of the llmtxt API. Defaults to `https://api.llmtxt.my`.

properties.name: token
properties.description: Bearer token for authentication. Pass your API key here (llmtxt_... format).

properties.name: onError
properties.description: Called when the WebSocket encounters an error.

properties.name: onAwareness
properties.description: Called when an AwarenessRelay (0x04) message is received. The payload is the raw awareness bytes relayed from a peer.

concepts.name: CanonicalPayloadOptions
concepts.what: Options for `buildCanonicalPayload`.  All fields map directly to the Rust `canonical_payload()` parameters in `crates/llmtxt-core/src/identity.rs`.

properties.name: method
properties.description: HTTP method, uppercase (e.g. "PUT").

properties.name: path
properties.description: Path and query string (e.g. "/api/v1/documents/abc").

properties.name: timestampMs
properties.description: Milliseconds since epoch.

properties.name: agentId
properties.description: Agent identifier registered on the server.

properties.name: nonceHex
properties.description: Hex-encoded nonce (≥ 16 bytes = ≥ 32 hex chars).

properties.name: bodyHashHex
properties.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the request body bytes (64 chars).

concepts.name: ValidationResult
concepts.what: Outcome of a content validation operation.

properties.name: success
properties.description: Whether the validation passed without errors.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The parsed/validated data, present only when `success` is `true`.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: List of validation errors, present only when `success` is `false`.

properties.name: format
properties.description: The detected or requested content format, when determinable.

concepts.name: ValidateContentOptions
concepts.what: Options for content validation.

properties.name: schemaName
properties.description: Optional predefined schema name for JSON validation.

properties.name: maxBytes
properties.description: Maximum content size in bytes. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 5 MB.

properties.name: maxLineBytes
properties.description: Maximum line length in bytes. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 64 KB.

properties.name: rejectBinary
properties.description: Reject content with binary control characters (0x00-0x08). Default: true.

concepts.name: SignedUrlConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for generating and verifying signed URLs.

properties.name: pathPrefix
properties.description: Optional path prefix like `/attachments`. Default: root path.

properties.name: signatureLength
properties.description: Signature length in hex chars. Default: 16.

concepts.name: VerifyResult
concepts.what: Outcome of verifying a signed URL.

properties.name: includeDecisions
properties.description: Include full decision log (default: true)

properties.name: includeObservations
properties.description: Include brain observations (default: true)

properties.name: maxSize
properties.description: Max content size before compression in bytes (default: 5MB)

concepts.name: DocumentEventLogEntry
concepts.what: A single event row from the document event log.

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Monotonically increasing per-document sequence number (as string — bigint-safe).

properties.name: fromSeq
properties.description: Resume from this sequence number (exclusive). If unset, starts from the beginning.

properties.name: apiKey
properties.description: Bearer token or API key for authenticated requests. Passed as `Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>` header.

properties.name: maxReconnects
properties.description: Maximum reconnect attempts within the circuit-breaker window (60s). Defaults to 5.

properties.name: signal
properties.description: AbortSignal to cancel the stream externally.

concepts.name: DocumentState
concepts.what: Lifecycle state of a collaborative document.

concepts.name: StateTransition
concepts.what: Record of a lifecycle state change.

properties.name: from
properties.description: State before the transition.

properties.name: to
properties.description: State after the transition.

properties.name: changedBy
properties.description: Agent that initiated the transition.

properties.name: changedAt
properties.description: Timestamp of the transition (ms since epoch).

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Human-readable reason for the transition.

properties.name: atVersion
properties.description: Document version number at the time of transition.

concepts.name: TransitionResult
concepts.what: Result of attempting a state transition.

properties.name: valid
properties.description: Whether the transition is allowed.

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Human-readable explanation when invalid.

properties.name: allowedTargets
properties.description: The allowed targets from the current state (for error context).

concepts.name: VersionEntry
concepts.what: A single version entry in a document's patch stack.

properties.name: versionNumber
properties.description: Sequential version number (1-based).

properties.name: patchText
properties.description: Unified diff patch text.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.description: Agent that authored this version.

properties.name: changelog
properties.description: One-line description of the change.

properties.name: contentHash
properties.description: SHA-256 hash of the resulting content after applying this patch.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Timestamp of creation (ms since epoch).

concepts.name: ReconstructionResult
concepts.what: Result of reconstructing a document at a specific version.

properties.name: content
properties.description: The document content at the requested version.

properties.name: version
properties.description: The version number that was reconstructed.

properties.name: patchesApplied
properties.description: Number of patches applied to reach this version.

properties.name: contentHash
properties.description: SHA-256 hash of the reconstructed content.

properties.name: tokenCount
properties.description: Token count of the reconstructed content.

concepts.name: PatchValidationResult
concepts.what: Result of validating whether a patch applies cleanly.

properties.name: applies
properties.description: Whether the patch can be applied without conflicts.

properties.name: error
properties.description: Error message if the patch does not apply.

properties.name: resultContent
properties.description: The content that would result if the patch applies.

concepts.name: ApprovalStatus
concepts.what: Status of an individual review.

concepts.name: ApprovalResult
concepts.what: Result of evaluating reviews against a policy.

properties.name: approved
properties.description: Whether the approval threshold is met.

properties.name: approvedBy
properties.description: Reviewers that have approved.

properties.name: rejectedBy
properties.description: Reviewers that have rejected.

properties.name: pendingFrom
properties.description: Reviewers that are still pending.

properties.name: staleFrom
properties.description: Reviewers whose reviews are stale (document changed since).

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Human-readable summary of the evaluation.

concepts.name: RetrievalOptions
concepts.what: Options for retrieval planning.

properties.name: minScore
properties.description: Minimum similarity score to include a section (0-1). Default: 0.1

properties.name: includeIntro
properties.description: Always include the first section (typically title/intro). Default: true

concepts.name: CreateVersionOptions
concepts.what: Options for creating a new version.

properties.name: agentId
properties.description: Agent creating this version.

properties.name: changelog
properties.description: One-line change description.

concepts.name: LlmtxtDocumentOptions
concepts.what: Options for constructing an LlmtxtDocument.

properties.name: slug
properties.description: Document slug.

properties.name: storage
properties.description: Storage adapter for persistence.

properties.name: since
properties.description: Resume from a specific sequence number (sent as Last-Event-ID).

properties.name: mode
properties.description: 'events' = raw event payloads; 'diff' = payloads include computed content diffs.

properties.name: baseUrl
properties.description: Base URL of the API (no trailing slash).

properties.name: apiKey
properties.description: Bearer API key.

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Monotonic sequence number (from Last-Event-ID).

properties.name: type
properties.description: Event type string (e.g. 'version.published', 'SECTION_LEASED').

properties.name: path
properties.description: The path pattern the subscription was opened with.

properties.name: payload
properties.description: Raw event payload.

properties.name: delta
properties.description: Section-level delta, present when mode='diff' and the server computed one.

concepts.name: StandaloneConfig
concepts.what: Config for standalone topology.  One agent, one local `.db` file, zero network dependency. Use for single developer or single agent, offline-first operation, local testing.

properties.name: storagePath
properties.description: Path for the local .db file. Defaults to '.llmtxt'.

properties.name: identityPath
properties.description: Optional path to agent identity keypair.

properties.name: crsqlite
properties.description: Set true to enable cr-sqlite (T385). Default: false.

properties.name: crsqliteExtPath
properties.description: Path to crsqlite extension (optional, see P2-cr-sqlite.md).

concepts.name: HubSpokeConfig
concepts.what: Config for hub-and-spoke topology.  One hub (PostgresBackend or a designated LocalBackend) is the Single Source of Truth. N spokes are RemoteBackend clients that write to and read from the hub. Ephemeral swarm workers are spokes with no local `.db` file.

properties.name: hubUrl
properties.description: URL of the hub API instance (e.g. 'https://api.llmtxt.my'). REQUIRED — validation MUST fail fast if absent.

properties.name: apiKey
properties.description: API key for authenticating with the hub. MUST be present for write operations.

properties.name: identityPath
properties.description: Ed25519 private key hex for signing writes (alternative to apiKey). If both are supplied, Ed25519 signed writes take precedence.

properties.name: persistLocally
properties.description: When true, this spoke maintains a local cr-sqlite replica. Requires T385 (cr-sqlite) to be installed. Default: false (ephemeral swarm worker mode — no .db file).

properties.name: storagePath
properties.description: Required when persistLocally=true. Path to local .db file.

concepts.name: MeshConfig
concepts.what: Config for mesh topology.  N persistent peers, each with their own cr-sqlite LocalBackend. No central hub is required. Peers sync directly with each other via the P2P transport defined in T386. Use for offline-first P2P collaboration, air-gapped environments, or small teams of persistent agents (≤10 peers).

properties.name: storagePath
properties.description: Path for the local cr-sqlite .db file. REQUIRED for mesh.

properties.name: identityPath
properties.description: Optional path to agent identity keypair. Defaults to storagePath/identity.json.

properties.name: peers
properties.description: Known peers at startup. Each entry is a transport address. Format: 'unix:/path/to/sock' | 'http://host:port'

properties.name: meshDir
properties.description: Directory where peer advertisement files are written and read. Defaults to $LLMTXT_MESH_DIR or '/tmp/llmtxt-mesh'.

properties.name: transport
properties.description: Transport to listen on. Default: 'unix'.

properties.name: port
properties.description: Port for http transport. Default: 7642.

concepts.name: TopologyConfig
concepts.what: Discriminated union of all topology configs, keyed on the `topology` field.

concepts.name: BackendConfig
concepts.what: Configuration for a Backend instance.  BackendConfig is passed to the backend constructor. LocalBackend uses storagePath + identityPath; RemoteBackend uses baseUrl + apiKey.

properties.name: storagePath
properties.description: Directory where the backend stores its data. For LocalBackend: SQLite DB and large content blobs live here. Defaults to '.llmtxt' relative to the working directory.

properties.name: identityPath
properties.description: Path to the agent identity keypair JSON file. Defaults to /identity.json.

properties.name: baseUrl
properties.description: Base URL of a remote LLMtxt API instance. Required for RemoteBackend. MUST include scheme (https://).

properties.name: apiKey
properties.description: API key for authenticating with the remote instance. Used by RemoteBackend in the Authorization header.

properties.name: wal
properties.description: SQLite WAL mode. Defaults to true. Only relevant for LocalBackend.

properties.name: leaseReaperIntervalMs
properties.description: Lease reaper interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 10_000. Only relevant for LocalBackend.

properties.name: presenceTtlMs
properties.description: Presence TTL in milliseconds. Defaults to 30_000. Only relevant for LocalBackend.

properties.name: crsqliteExtPath
properties.description: Absolute path to a pre-downloaded crsqlite native extension (.so / .dylib / .dll). When supplied, LocalBackend uses this path instead of resolving the extension via vlcn.io/crsqlite. Useful in air-gapped or bundled environments where the install-time binary download is not possible.  DR-P2-01: If absent, LocalBackend attempts to resolve the path from the vlcn.io/crsqlite optional peer dependency. If neither is available, LocalBackend opens without cr-sqlite (hasCRR = false, no crash).

properties.name: maxBlobSizeBytes
properties.description: Maximum blob size in bytes. Defaults to 100 * 1024 * 1024 (100 MB).

properties.name: blobStorageMode
properties.description: Blob storage mode for PostgresBackend. 's3' uses S3/R2 object storage (default). 'pg-lo' uses PostgreSQL large objects.

properties.name: s3Endpoint
properties.description: S3/R2 endpoint URL (e.g. "https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com").

properties.name: s3Bucket
properties.description: S3/R2 bucket name. Required when blobStorageMode = 's3'.

properties.name: s3Region
properties.description: S3/R2 region (e.g. "us-east-1").

properties.name: s3AccessKeyId
properties.description: S3/R2 access key ID.

properties.name: s3SecretAccessKey
properties.description: S3/R2 secret access key.

concepts.name: ListResult
concepts.what: Paginated list result.

properties.name: nextCursor
properties.description: Cursor to pass for the next page, or null if no more results.

concepts.name: AppendEventParams
concepts.what: Parameters for appending an event.

concepts.name: QueryEventsParams
concepts.what: Parameters for querying events.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Filter by event type.

properties.name: since
properties.description: Return events after this cursor (event id).

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Maximum results. Defaults to 50.

concepts.name: CrdtState
concepts.what: Current CRDT state for a section.

properties.name: stateVectorBase64
properties.description: Serialized Yjs state vector as base64.

properties.name: snapshotBase64
properties.description: Current merged document state as base64.

concepts.name: PresenceEntry
concepts.what: A presence record for an agent viewing a document.

properties.name: meta
properties.description: Agent metadata (cursor position, color, etc.).

properties.name: expiresAt
properties.description: Expiry timestamp (ms since epoch).

concepts.name: AgentPubkeyRecord
concepts.what: A registered agent public key record.

properties.name: pubkeyHex
properties.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key.

properties.name: revokedAt
properties.description: If set, this key has been revoked.

concepts.name: EventOps
concepts.what: Document event log operations.

properties.name: appendEvent
properties.description: Append an event to a document's event log. MUST emit the event on the local bus for subscribeStream consumers.

properties.name: queryEvents
properties.description: Query the event log for a document with optional filtering.

properties.name: subscribeStream
properties.description: Subscribe to the event stream for a document. MUST return an AsyncIterable that yields events as they are appended. MUST clean up listeners when the consumer calls .return() or the iterator is GC'd. LocalBackend uses in-process EventEmitter; RemoteBackend uses SSE.

concepts.name: ContributorRecord
concepts.what: A contributor record tracking per-agent token attribution.

properties.name: netTokens
properties.description: Net token contribution (positive = added, negative = removed).

properties.name: versionCount
properties.description: Number of versions this agent has contributed.

concepts.name: GraphResult
concepts.what: Global knowledge graph result.

properties.name: nodes
properties.type: { id: string; slug: string; title: string; state: string; }[]

properties.name: edges
properties.type: { source: string; target: string; label?: string; }[]

concepts.name: WebhookTestResult
concepts.what: Result of a webhook test delivery.

concepts.name: ApprovalChainEntry
concepts.what: An entry in the tamper-evident approval chain.

concepts.name: ApprovalChainResult
concepts.what: Result of verifying the approval chain for a document.

concepts.name: ExportDocumentResult
concepts.what: Result returned by exportDocument().

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Absolute path of the written file.

properties.name: slug
properties.description: Slug of the exported document.

properties.name: version
properties.description: Version number exported.

properties.name: fileHash
properties.description: SHA-256 hex of the written file bytes.

properties.name: byteCount
properties.description: Number of bytes written.

properties.name: exportedAt
properties.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of export.

properties.name: signatureHex
properties.description: Ed25519 signature hex over fileHash, if sign=true. Null otherwise.

concepts.name: ExportAllResult
concepts.what: Result returned by exportAll().

concepts.name: ImportDocumentResult
concepts.what: Result returned by importDocument().

properties.name: action
properties.description: Whether a new document was created or a version was appended.

concepts.name: DocumentExportState
concepts.what: Self-contained document snapshot passed to all format serializers.  All fields required by the canonical frontmatter schema are present at the top level; additional fields feed the JSON format.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Human-readable document title.

properties.name: slug
properties.description: URL-safe slug.

properties.name: version
properties.description: Version number of the exported state (integer, 1-based).

properties.name: state
properties.description: Lifecycle state string (DRAFT | REVIEW | LOCKED | ARCHIVED).

properties.name: contributors
properties.description: Agent IDs that have contributed to this document. Formatters MUST sort these lexicographically before serialization.

properties.name: contentHash
properties.description: SHA-256 hex of the body content (64 lowercase hex chars). Callers compute this; formatters embed it verbatim.

properties.name: exportedAt
properties.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision. Injected by the caller so that determinism is achievable across repeated calls.

properties.name: content
properties.description: Full body content of the exported version.

properties.name: labels
properties.description: Arbitrary metadata labels. Present if available; omitted or null otherwise.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.description: Agent that created the document.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Creation timestamp (Unix milliseconds).

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Last-modified timestamp (Unix milliseconds).

properties.name: versionCount
properties.description: Total number of versions for this document.

properties.name: chainRef
properties.description: BFT approval chain hash from `getApprovalChain`. Null when no approvals exist or when CRDT state is unavailable (T451 stub).

concepts.name: PeerSyncState
concepts.what: In-memory peer sync state. Persisted externally via llmtxt_mesh_state table.

properties.name: maxPeerFailures
properties.description: Maximum consecutive failures before a peer is marked inactive.

properties.name: onMessage
properties.description: Handler called when a valid, verified A2A message arrives for THIS agent.

concepts.name: PostgresBackendConfig
concepts.what: Extended config for PostgresBackend.

properties.name: connectionString
properties.description: PostgreSQL connection string. MUST be in the format: postgresql://user:passhost:5432/dbname Defaults to DATABASE_URL environment variable.

properties.name: maxConnections
properties.description: Maximum number of connections in the pool. Defaults to 10.

concepts.name: ApplyBlobChangesetResult
concepts.what: Result of applying a BlobChangeset.

properties.name: applied
properties.description: Number of blob refs successfully applied (winners inserted).

properties.name: discarded
properties.description: Number of blob refs that lost LWW and were discarded.

properties.name: pendingFetches
properties.description: Hashes scheduled for lazy background pull.

concepts.name: EventPublisher
concepts.what: An object that can publish typed events onto a named channel.  Implementations MUST be synchronous-safe — callers do not await publish().

properties.name: publish
properties.description: Emit `event` on `channel`.  All active subscribers on `channel` MUST receive the event in FIFO order. Delivery to a slow subscriber MUST NOT block other subscribers.

concepts.name: EventSubscriber
concepts.what: An object that can return an async iterable of typed events from a channel.  The iterable MUST yield events in the order they were published. Calling `return()` on the iterator MUST unsubscribe from the channel.

properties.name: subscribe
properties.description: Return an `AsyncIterable<T>` that yields every event published on `channel` after the subscription is opened.  Past events (before the subscription was opened) MUST NOT be replayed unless the implementation explicitly supports seek/cursor semantics.

concepts.name: EventStream
concepts.what: A bidirectional event stream that can both publish and subscribe.

concepts.name: DocumentEventBusLike
concepts.what: Shape of the document event bus used by PostgresBackend (injected from apps/backend realtime layer).  Uses a single `'document'` channel and emits objects shaped as `{ type, slug, documentId, timestamp, actor, data }`.

properties.name: ttlSeconds
properties.description: Default TTL in seconds (spec default: 30).

properties.name: broadcastIntervalMs
properties.description: Broadcast interval in ms (spec: 10 s).

properties.name: rateLimitWindowMs
properties.description: Rate limit window in ms — max 1 message per peer per window (spec: 5 s).

properties.name: initialDocumentId
properties.description: Current document/section the agent is editing (updated via setPresence).

concepts.name: AgentSessionState
concepts.what: Session state machine: Idle - Open - Active - Closing - Closed  - Idle: Initial state, waiting for open() - Open: Backend initialization in progress (transient; transitions to Active) - Active: Ready for contributions via contribute() - Closing: Teardown in progress (mutex-protected) - Closed: Teardown complete, receipt emitted

concepts.name: AgentSessionOptions
concepts.what: AgentSessionOptions: constructor configuration.

properties.name: backend
properties.description: Backend to operate through (LocalBackend or RemoteBackend). Typed as Backend to enable proper method calls; consumers pass concrete implementations (LocalBackend or RemoteBackend).

properties.name: agentId
properties.description: Agent identity. MUST match the authenticated identity registered in the backend's identity primitives.

properties.name: sessionId
properties.description: Cryptographically random session ID (128-bit entropy minimum). If omitted, AgentSession generates one using crypto.randomUUID(). MUST be unguessable; predictable IDs allow session hijacking.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Human-readable label for this session. Used in receipts. Defaults to agentId + timestamp ISO string.

concepts.name: PostgresChangesetAdapterOptions
concepts.what: Options for constructing a PostgresChangesetAdapter.

properties.name: db
properties.description: Postgres client or connection pool used for querying row changes.  TODO: Replace `unknown` with the concrete postgres.js client type once the full implementation is written.

properties.name: sinceXid
properties.description: The last synced Postgres transaction ID (xid) for a given peer. Rows with txid  sinceXid will be included in the next changeset. Defaults to 0 (full snapshot).

concepts.name: MeshChangesetRouteOptions
concepts.what: Options for the POST /mesh/changeset route handler.

properties.name: adapter
properties.description: PostgresChangesetAdapter instance wired to the PostgresBackend.

properties.name: maxChangesetBytes
properties.description: Maximum changeset size in bytes (default: 10 MB per P3 spec §10).

concepts.name: MeshChangesetResult
concepts.what: Generic POST /mesh/changeset handler result.  The route handler is framework-agnostic: the caller (Hono/Express/etc.) provides the request body and receives a structured result to render.

properties.name: status
properties.description: HTTP status code to return.

properties.name: body
properties.description: Response body as an object (caller serializes to JSON).

properties.name: delta
properties.description: Delta changeset bytes to return in the response body (bidirectional sync).

concepts.name: BuildA2AOptions
concepts.what: Options for building an A2A message.

concepts.name: BFTApprovalStatus
concepts.what: BFT approval status.

concepts.name: BFTStatusResponse
concepts.what: Response from GET /documents/:slug/bft/status.

concepts.name: SendScratchpadOptions
concepts.what: Options for sending a scratchpad message.

properties.name: content
properties.description: Message content body.

properties.name: contentType
properties.description: MIME content type (default: "text/plain").

properties.name: threadId
properties.description: Optional thread identifier for reply chains.

properties.name: identity
properties.description: Agent identity for signing (optional — unsigned if omitted).

properties.name: agentId
properties.description: Agent ID to include in the request (required if identity provided).

concepts.name: ReadScratchpadOptions
concepts.what: Options for reading scratchpad messages.

properties.name: lastId
properties.description: Return messages after this stream ID.

properties.name: threadId
properties.description: Filter by thread.

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Default 100.

operations.name: buildGraph
operations.what: Build a knowledge graph from an array of messages.  Delegates to crates/llmtxt-core::graph::build_graph_wasm.
preconditions: Error if the Rust core returns an error.

operations.name: generateOverview
operations.what: Generate a structural overview of a document.  Delegates to crates/llmtxt-core::disclosure::generate_overview_wasm.
preconditions: Error if the Rust core returns an error object.

operations.name: buildCanonicalPayload
operations.what: Build the canonical payload bytes (UTF-8 encoded).  Format (newline-separated, same as Rust `canonical_payload()`):

operations.name: createIdentity
operations.what: Generate a fresh `AgentIdentity` and persist it. Convenience wrapper around `AgentIdentity.generate()`.

operations.name: validateJson
operations.what: Validate content as JSON, optionally against a predefined schema.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The raw content to validate (string or pre-parsed value).

inputs.name: schemaName
inputs.description: Optional name of a predefined schema to enforce.

outputs.text: A `ValidationResult` indicating success or listing errors.

operations.name: validateText
operations.what: Validate content as plain text or markdown.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: The value to validate as text.

outputs.text: A `ValidationResult` with `format` set to `"text"` on success.

operations.name: validateContent
operations.what: Validate content for a given format, with optional schema enforcement and content size limits.

inputs.name: schemaNameOrOptions
inputs.description: A schema name string (backward compat) or options object.

outputs.text: A `ValidationResult` indicating success or listing errors.

operations.name: generateSignedUrl
operations.what: Generate a signed URL for accessing a document.

operations.name: generateOrgSignedUrl
operations.what: Generate an org-scoped signed URL for accessing a document. The URL includes the org parameter for organization-level access verification.

operations.name: generateTimedUrl
operations.what: Generate a signed URL that expires after the given duration.

operations.name: validateTransition
operations.what: Validate a proposed state transition with a detailed result.

outputs.text: A result object indicating validity and allowed alternatives.

operations.name: validatePatchApplies
operations.what: Check whether a patch applies cleanly to the given content.

outputs.text: Whether the patch applies and the resulting content.

operations.name: buildContributorSummary
operations.what: Build aggregated contributor summaries from version attributions.

outputs.text: Contributor summaries sorted by total versions authored (descending).

operations.name: validateTopologyConfig
operations.what: Validate an unknown value as a `TopologyConfig`.  Throws `TopologyConfigError` with exact messages from ARCH-T429 spec §3.3 on any validation failure.
preconditions: `TopologyConfigError`   - `INVALID_TOPOLOGY_MODE` — topology field is not a recognized value.   - `MISSING_HUB_URL` — hub-spoke topology missing `hubUrl`.   - `MISSING_STORAGE_PATH_PERSIST` — hub-spoke with persistLocally=true missing `storagePath`.   - `MISSING_STORAGE_PATH_MESH` — mesh topology missing `storagePath`.

operations.name: validateBlobName
operations.what: Validate a blob attachment name using the Rust WASM primitive.  Throws `BlobNameInvalidError` when any of the following are true:   - name is empty or exceeds 255 bytes (UTF-8)   - name contains path traversal sequences (`..`)   - name contains path separators (`/` or `\`)   - name contains null bytes (`\0`)   - name has leading or trailing whitespace  Delegates to crates/llmtxt-core::blob_name_validate via WASM.

operations.name: createBackend
operations.what: Create a Backend instance appropriate for the given topology config.  This is the primary entry point for all agent code that needs a Backend. Prefer this over constructing LocalBackend or RemoteBackend directly.  Validation (ARCH-T429 §3.3) runs before any backend is constructed: - `hub-spoke` without `hubUrl` → throws `TopologyConfigError` - `hub-spoke` with `persistLocally=true` without `storagePath` → throws `TopologyConfigError` - `mesh` without `storagePath` → throws `TopologyConfigError` - Unknown `topology` value → throws `TopologyConfigError`  The returned backend must have `open()` called before use.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: A validated `TopologyConfig`. Unknown shapes are   rejected by `validateTopologyConfig` before dispatch.

outputs.text: A `Backend` instance for the requested topology.

operations.name: createPgBackend
operations.what: Create an isolated PostgresBackend instance backed by a temporary Postgres schema.  Applies all migrations (except pgvector), injects schema + stubs, and returns a cleanup callback to drop the schema after the test suite.  Throws if DATABASE_URL_PG is not set.

operations.name: buildBlobChangeset
operations.what: Collect BlobRef entries for all active blobs modified since `sinceMs`.  The sync layer calls this after `getChangesSince` to augment the binary changeset with blob manifest metadata. The caller passes the combined BlobChangeset to the receiving peer.  `sinceMs = 0` returns refs for all active blobs on the document.

inputs.name: crsqlBytes
inputs.description: The binary cr-sqlite changeset to embed

inputs.name: docSlug
inputs.description: The document slug to scope blob refs to (optional)

inputs.name: sinceMs
inputs.description: Only include blobs with uploadedAt  sinceMs (0 = all)

operations.name: createMeshChangesetHandler
operations.what: Create a framework-agnostic handler for the POST /mesh/changeset endpoint.  Intended usage in apps/backend (Hono):

outputs.text: An async handler function `(changesetBytes, peerSinceXid) => MeshChangesetResult`.  TODO: Wire into apps/backend/src/routes/ once adapter is fully implemented.

operations.name: buildA2AMessage
operations.what: Build and sign an A2A message.  The payload is JSON-serialized and base64-encoded. The signature covers the canonical bytes (matches Rust A2AMessage::canonical_bytes()).

operations.name: buildApprovalCanonicalPayload
operations.what:
Build the canonical approval payload string (to be signed).  Format: `documentSlug
reviewerId
status
atVersion
timestamp`

constraints.rule: Error if the WASM module returns a serialization error (should not occur   in practice — the Rust code catches all errors and returns a valid JSON string).
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
Error if the Rust core returns an error object.
If a patch in the sequence fails to apply.

`TopologyConfigError`   - `INVALID_TOPOLOGY_MODE` — topology field is not a recognized value.   - `MISSING_HUB_URL` — hub-spoke topology missing `hubUrl`.   - `MISSING_STORAGE_PATH_PERSIST` — hub-spoke with persistLocally=true missing `storagePath`.   - `MISSING_STORAGE_PATH_MESH` — mesh topology missing `storagePath`.
ExportError with code 'UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT' for unknown formats.
ExportError on write or sign failure.
ExportError PARSE_FAILED on I/O or parse errors.
ExportError HASH_MISMATCH when frontmatter content_hash does not   match the actual body SHA-256.

configSchema.description: Maximum number of entries before the least-recently-used entry is evicted (default: 1000).
Default time-to-live in milliseconds for new entries (default: 24 hours).
Base URL of the llmtxt API. Defaults to `https://api.llmtxt.my`.
Bearer token for authentication. Pass your API key here (llmtxt_... format).
Called when the WebSocket encounters an error.
Called when an AwarenessRelay (0x04) message is received. The payload is the raw awareness bytes relayed from a peer.
HTTP method, uppercase (e.g. "PUT").
Path and query string (e.g. "/api/v1/documents/abc").
Milliseconds since epoch.
Agent identifier registered on the server.
Hex-encoded nonce (≥ 16 bytes = ≥ 32 hex chars).
Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the request body bytes (64 chars).
Optional predefined schema name for JSON validation.
Maximum content size in bytes. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 5 MB.
Maximum line length in bytes. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 64 KB.
Reject content with binary control characters (0x00-0x08). Default: true.
Optional path prefix like `/attachments`. Default: root path.
Signature length in hex chars. Default: 16.
Include full decision log (default: true)
Include brain observations (default: true)
Max content size before compression in bytes (default: 5MB)
Resume from this sequence number (exclusive). If unset, starts from the beginning.
Bearer token or API key for authenticated requests. Passed as `Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>` header.
Maximum reconnect attempts within the circuit-breaker window (60s). Defaults to 5.
AbortSignal to cancel the stream externally.
Minimum similarity score to include a section (0-1). Default: 0.1
Always include the first section (typically title/intro). Default: true
Agent creating this version.
One-line change description.
Document slug.
Storage adapter for persistence.
Resume from a specific sequence number (sent as Last-Event-ID).
'events' = raw event payloads; 'diff' = payloads include computed content diffs.
Base URL of the API (no trailing slash).
Bearer API key.
Path for the local .db file. Defaults to '.llmtxt'.
Optional path to agent identity keypair.
Set true to enable cr-sqlite (T385). Default: false.
Path to crsqlite extension (optional, see P2-cr-sqlite.md).
URL of the hub API instance (e.g. 'https://api.llmtxt.my'). REQUIRED — validation MUST fail fast if absent.
API key for authenticating with the hub. MUST be present for write operations.
Ed25519 private key hex for signing writes (alternative to apiKey). If both are supplied, Ed25519 signed writes take precedence.
When true, this spoke maintains a local cr-sqlite replica. Requires T385 (cr-sqlite) to be installed. Default: false (ephemeral swarm worker mode — no .db file).
Required when persistLocally=true. Path to local .db file.
Path for the local cr-sqlite .db file. REQUIRED for mesh.
Optional path to agent identity keypair. Defaults to storagePath/identity.json.
Known peers at startup. Each entry is a transport address. Format: 'unix:/path/to/sock' | 'http://host:port'
Directory where peer advertisement files are written and read. Defaults to $LLMTXT_MESH_DIR or '/tmp/llmtxt-mesh'.
Transport to listen on. Default: 'unix'.
Port for http transport. Default: 7642.
Directory where the backend stores its data. For LocalBackend: SQLite DB and large content blobs live here. Defaults to '.llmtxt' relative to the working directory.
Path to the agent identity keypair JSON file. Defaults to /identity.json.
Base URL of a remote LLMtxt API instance. Required for RemoteBackend. MUST include scheme (https://).
API key for authenticating with the remote instance. Used by RemoteBackend in the Authorization header.
SQLite WAL mode. Defaults to true. Only relevant for LocalBackend.
Lease reaper interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 10_000. Only relevant for LocalBackend.
Presence TTL in milliseconds. Defaults to 30_000. Only relevant for LocalBackend.

Absolute path to a pre-downloaded crsqlite native extension (.so / .dylib / .dll). When supplied, LocalBackend uses this path instead of resolving the extension via vlcn.io/crsqlite. Useful in air-gapped or bundled environments where the install-time binary download is not possible.  DR-P2-01: If absent, LocalBackend attempts to resolve the path from the vlcn.io/crsqlite optional peer dependency. If neither is available, LocalBackend opens without cr-sqlite (hasCRR = false, no crash).
Maximum blob size in bytes. Defaults to 100 * 1024 * 1024 (100 MB).
Blob storage mode for PostgresBackend. 's3' uses S3/R2 object storage (default). 'pg-lo' uses PostgreSQL large objects.
S3/R2 endpoint URL (e.g. "https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com").
S3/R2 bucket name. Required when blobStorageMode = 's3'.
S3/R2 region (e.g. "us-east-1").
S3/R2 access key ID.
S3/R2 secret access key.
Maximum consecutive failures before a peer is marked inactive.
Handler called when a valid, verified A2A message arrives for THIS agent.
PostgreSQL connection string. MUST be in the format: postgresql://user:passhost:5432/dbname Defaults to DATABASE_URL environment variable.
Maximum number of connections in the pool. Defaults to 10.
Default TTL in seconds (spec default: 30).
Broadcast interval in ms (spec: 10 s).
Rate limit window in ms — max 1 message per peer per window (spec: 5 s).
Current document/section the agent is editing (updated via setPresence).
Backend to operate through (LocalBackend or RemoteBackend). Typed as Backend to enable proper method calls; consumers pass concrete implementations (LocalBackend or RemoteBackend).
Agent identity. MUST match the authenticated identity registered in the backend's identity primitives.
Cryptographically random session ID (128-bit entropy minimum). If omitted, AgentSession generates one using crypto.randomUUID(). MUST be unguessable; predictable IDs allow session hijacking.
Human-readable label for this session. Used in receipts. Defaults to agentId + timestamp ISO string.
Postgres client or connection pool used for querying row changes.  TODO: Replace `unknown` with the concrete postgres.js client type once the full implementation is written.
The last synced Postgres transaction ID (xid) for a given peer. Rows with txid  sinceXid will be included in the next changeset. Defaults to 0 (full snapshot).
PostgresChangesetAdapter instance wired to the PostgresBackend.
Maximum changeset size in bytes (default: 10 MB per P3 spec §10).
Message content body.
MIME content type (default: "text/plain").
Optional thread identifier for reply chains.
Agent identity for signing (optional — unsigned if omitted).
Agent ID to include in the request (required if identity provided).
Return messages after this stream ID.
Filter by thread.
Maximum number of messages to return. Default 100.
